title: KEPLIN Non-Slip Microfibre Bath & Toilet Mat - Soft, Plush & Comfortable Rug with Machine Washable Design - Water Absorbent & Quick Drying to Keep Bathroom & Home Hygienic & Clean (50x80cm) Navy
features: LUXURIOUS COMFORT: Our bathmat is crafted from high-quality chenille, renowned for its unparalleled softness and soothing properties that will relax your feet after a long day and help feet to dry quickly. Our bathmat boasts a revolutionary new technology that makes it even softer and more exquisite.

QUICKLY ABSORBS WATER: Our mat is designed to keep your bathroom floor dry and free from dripping water. Made with absorbent sponges and chenille yarn, our mat quickly absorbs water so you can step out of the shower without slipping or dripping. The mat's neat and fine stitching makes it durable, and it's perfect for everyday use.

SAFETY COMES FIRST: The innovated PVC material on the back prevents skidding and shifting, providing a secure and stable surface for you to step on. For optimal safety, avoid placing the mat on wet floors. Avoid dust and water build-up under the mat, which can cause it to slip.

EFFORTLESS CLEANING: Our mat is easy to clean, making it a hassle-free addition to your bathroom. You can shake, sweep, or vacuum it, put it in the washing machine and can tumble dry on low heat or lay it out to air dry.

REFINED AND STYLISH DESIGN - Elevate your bathroom aesthetic with our Keplin Mat. Our mat is not just functional but also adds a touch of charm to your bathroom decor. With its charming versatility and adorable charm, it’s not just limited to the bathroom it can effortlessly complement your kitchen, outdoors, living room, bedroom, or anywhere you need to swiftly dry your feet!
description: Product Description Product Specification Brand: KEPLIN Material: Premium fluffy microfibre Size: 50x80cm Colour: Navy Safety: Anti-slip design with PVC material Hygiene: Machine washable for easy cleaning and quick drying Luxurious Comfort and Hygiene: KEPLIN Non-Slip Microfibre Bath & Toilet Mat Indulge in Softness and Practicality with a Plush, Quick-Drying Rug Crafted from premium fluffy microfibre for a soft, quick-drying touch after your shower. The anti-slip design ensures safety on smooth surfaces, thanks to PVC material. High water absorption with advanced fibre locking technology, keeping the mat dry and your bathroom clean. Conveniently machine washable, our mat saves you time & money on maintenance. The design effortlessly complements various spaces, making it versatile for kitchen, living room, bedroom, or outdoors.
